examples.eng: The farmhouse was shut in by tall trees.
He tried to recall the layout of the farmhouse.
They've rented a farmhouse right out in the country.
examples.ru: Они сняли дом прямо там, в деревне.

examples.eng: It is a seventeenth century farmhouse with some Victorian additions grafted on.
examples.ru: Это крестьянский дом семнадцатого века с некоторыми дополнениями в викторианском стиле.

examples.eng: The men took shelter in a bombed-out farmhouse.
